feed.title: SAP Community - SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central
feed.subtitle: SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Attachment deleted when HR Admin updating
entry.content: When doing a legal name change or termination where a manager for example has added an attachment. When the HR admin is doing a check and clicking update the attachment is getting deleted which it should not be.

entry.title: to be deleted..
entry.content: ss

entry.title: Issue related to User ID mapping from EC to ECC
entry.content:
Hi Team,

We have a situation, in Employee Central  User id  is  generated as M10001765, how can we map it with existing employee ID in ECC (SAP HCM) which is 8 digit numeric number  62763465.

Also, when new employee is hired in EC its will have new employee id started with M1XXXXXX  then how we map and replicate the new User id  in ECC (SAP HCM).

Please suggest

entry.title: Difference between Job Function and Job Family in SuccessFactors
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

How do the following differ: Job Function in Employee Central which is created via Admin Center > Manage Data > Create 'Job Function'

vs

Job Family, Job Roles created in Admin Center > Manage Job Profile Content

We know the relationship between Job Family > Job Roles > Job Codes > Positions > Employee, and how it works. 

My Query is what is the relationship of Job Function to the above? 

In other words, what guidelines should a customer follow to decide which is a Job Function or which is a Job Family.

Regards,

JP

entry.title: Time Off Recruit Rule: Rounding up in 0.5s
entry.content:
Hi experts,

I have a problem in Time Management I cant get quite right. Our company keeps a rather simple system for time off, just assigning Days to be booked at half or full increments. 

We are flexible for new joiners and try to round up when their time off is in the form of a decimal place. For example, our full balance is 26 days for the year, and when someone joins the system will take 15.2 and default up to 16 for example. In reality, it would be more appropriate to get it to 15.5.

AIs there some way to get the rounding to be more to 0.5 as to +1?

Thank you,

entry.title: Not able to cascade a picklist ( State & City )
entry.content:
Hi , I am a beginner and trying to work around "How to cascade a Picklist" but while doing so the below error is throwing : 

Casescenario :

Step 1 : 2 Picklist created ( State as Parent and City as Child with Picklist values )

Step 2 : Both the Picklist assigned to MDF object ( Business Unit ) 

Step 3 : While cascading Picklist the below error is reflecting , dont know why ?

Looking for support

entry.title: User unable to export the paystub to PDF using an iPad/iOS device.
entry.content:
Hi Community

We have an issue with paystub.

One user is unable to export his paytub to PDF using an iPad/iOS device, he can do it using a laptop or a computer, but he is traveeling and he needs to be able usin his iPad.

Do you know what could be the issue?

We already confirm he has all the requiered permissions.

Thanks.

entry.title: I have empty values for LTI. They are still being published as a record in Compensation Info Portlet
entry.content: I have empty values for LTI. They are still being published as a record in Compensation Info Portlet. Empty values were not in the past. Is this normal? Did something change?

entry.title: HRA pay component value as amount .
entry.content:
Hi Seniors 

Please help me with the below query .

HRA pay component type is " Percentage " which is 40% of Basic pay but in UI screen wanted see sum of 40% only

HRA needs to be shown as a sum instead of a percentage

entry.title: Job profile management
entry.content:
Hello,
for the management of job profiles, we would like to manage the following two activities automatically:
1) automatic addition of a list of competencies when creating a new job profile
2) creation of a custom table to be saved in SSFF and this to be used to populate the competencies rating information according to the professional family of the role linked to the job profile

does anyone know of a way of handling this request? could the integration centre help, or is it necessary to use other tools?

thanks

entry.title: Benefits Open Enrollment "Edit" action goes to the workflow directly without reaching the cart
entry.content:
While configuring the Open Enrollment for Global benefits, the New enrollment selections are being added to the cart without any issues.

However, for those benefits which are being carried over, the "Edit" transaction doesn't let you add the changes to the cart but instead trigger a workflow directly. Is there a way to make it add to the cart and tie it to a cart workflow?

entry.title: Calling APIs from S/4 to SF/EC using Cloud Connector
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

We are working in a project in which we need to do API calls (post and gets) from S/4 to SuccessFactors/Employee Central(SF/EC).
We have a BTP account already set, with Cloud Connector already configured and CPI as well (this last one will be used to replicate data from SF/EC to S/4).
Client has some security concerns when it comes to the usage of direct API calls from S/4 to SF/EC ( he says that he is afraid of getting hacked and so, does not want to expose the API calls, we wants to "hide" the API calls to the outside), so, he requested us to use Cloud Connector when communicating between S/4 and SF/EC.
I have searched and could not find a way to make use of the Cloud Connector, when it comes to API calls from S/4 to SF/EC (EC will be the server in this case).
Could anyone advise if it's possible to use Cloud Connector for this purpose?
If not, can anyone propose any other approach (using CPI as a middleware and creating a Proxy there, for example)?
Thank you in advance.

PS: I have limited knowledge when it comes to BASIS/Integration Topics.

entry.title: What is the difference between these two offerings from SAP for learning SF Employee Central?
entry.content:
SAP Learning Journeys (free until certification):

Course:  Configuring SAP Employee Central Core -

https://learning.sap.com/learning-journeys/configure-sap-successfactors-employee-central-core

SAP Training (paid): 

Course: THR81, SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central Core Academy

https://training.sap.com/course/thr81-sap-successfactors-employee-central-core-academy-remoteclassroom-022-us-en/?

I'm wondering which one should I subscribe to start my SF EC learning. Both appear similar but one appears free and the other is paid but the paid one is more structured which is good. We all like the free stuff but wanted to make sure I'm not paying for something that's already available free. Also, from my understanding, for the free one, it appears that there is a pre-requisite that you have an Employee central already implemented to leverage the training (we don't have EC but have PM/GM and comp). 

It will be helpful if someone can clarify these. 

Thanks

entry.title: Code Descriptions in Reports out of EC
entry.content:
Hi All,

Does anyone know how to add code descriptions to reports in the Report Centre in EC?

entry.title: SAP SF Employee Central Core Question
entry.content:
Hello Friends !

Please suggest your answer to the below question.

How do you create country specific field for the Legal Entity Object?
Please choose one correct answer:

a) As a generic object with a Valid When association to the Legal Entity object.
b) As an HRIS element in the Corporate Data Model with a Composite association to the Legal Entity object.
c) As an HRIS element in the Country Specific Field for Corporate Data Model with a Valid When Association to the Legal Entity object.

d) As a generic object with a composite association to the Legal Entity object.

#SAP Employee Central Core,
SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central 
#Employee central core
#SAP SF EC
#THR81

entry.title: Notification of leaver action, before workflow approval takes place
entry.content:
Hello,

I am trying to find a solution to notify our IT team when a leaver action has been triggered for any employee in employee central; we do already have a 2 step workflow approval set up (which IT are not a part of and don’t need to be) - but we want to notify them BEFORE the workflow is approved as it can sometime be delayed causing potential security risks, and we may need to remove IT access from the leaver before their leaving date. I also want to be able to use a custom notification with specific information on it to send to IT (i.e. not use the standard notification template).

  • I don’t want to add them as an additional approver as this could slow the process even further and there is no approval required by them - is just for visibility that a leaver action has been triggered.
  • I have tried adding them as a contributor to the workflow, but that will only allow the standard notification template to be used.
  • I have tried adding multiple workflows to the leaver action - but that is not possible (as per SAP notes https://userapps.support.sap.com/sap/support/knowledge/en/3286215#:~:text=Resolution,one%20workflow%20triggering%20per%20transaction)
  • Reporting is too late - we need to know as the action is being triggered not after the fact.

Does anyone else have a similar requirement or know of anything else I can try?

Many thanks in advance!

Liz

entry.title: Scheduled Job Manager| Getting error - The user ID is invalid, unknown, or unauthorized
entry.content:
Hi All,

We have created a scheduled job request in Scheduled Job Manager using Admin User for uploading attachments in one of the background elements in Employee File.
Attachments files uploaded in SFTP as required.

The attachments are uploaded to the Active Users. All the users are present in the instance.

Getting this error - Error Msg: The user ID is invalid, unknown, or unauthorized

Kindly help - for to solve this issue. we read many KB articles , but none of these exactly show how to solve this issue.

Error Screenshot attached.

entry.title: storie report position
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community, does anyone know how I can get the following data for a storie report:

- If the position is in Vacant status, bring the time it is vacant, today from the org chart we see it as the position has vacant status since and calculate the time, example: 8 months and 5 days. how can I capture this data for storie report?

- It is possible to create a column within the report, where every time a user downloads the report it will bring the date of execution, i.e. if today June 10 I run the report, when viewing this I will find a column with the date on which it was executed.

I would appreciate your support

SAP SuccessFactors People Analytics  SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central

entry.title: SF EC Name Format - middle initial vs middle name
entry.content:
Hi - 

Currently, the name format that we have in place shows the First Name, Middle Name and Last Name. We would like to adjust our Name Format across SF to only show the middle initial, if applicable. We don't have a designated field in EC that stores the middle initial and was hoping we could use a business rule or some other functionality to only show the first character of the middle name vs the entire middle name. Is it possible to configure the Name Format this way or would we need a designated field in EC that contains the middle initial?

Thanks

entry.title: Necesito modificar la cuenta tiempo en SSFF, pero no esta habilitado, me aparece un candado
entry.content:
Necesito modificar la cuenta tiempo en SSFF, pero no esta habilitado, me aparece un candado.

¿Cómo puedo quitar ese candado que tiene employe central?
